top_tweets.text:

top_tweets.text:

top_tweets.text:

top_tweets.text:

top_tweets.text:
The enshitification of product marketing using AI/GenAI by the wealthiest conglomerates because they can't be bothered to care about having human artists and experts think about what would appeal to us, is a sign to heed.

criteria.score_formula: likes（主要）+ Claude 人工過濾廣告/招聘/meme/非設計
claude_filter_rules: 排除純廣告、招聘文（有洞見的 JD 除外）
排除與產品設計/PM 無關（crypto、體育、政治等）
排除 meme/搞笑但無內容
偏好有觀點的原創內容
